SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-11-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-11-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. PLAINTIFF ARJUN PATIL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ARGUMEDO GARZON LAW GROUP IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS VICTORIA ARGUMEDO. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOHN TRUE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-11-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATIL, ARJUN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ARGUMEDO GARZON LAW GROUP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
